changeSet.author: digitaltwinapp-api
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE digitaltwinapp.transaction_schemas ( trans_code INTEGER NOT NULL, json_schema JSONB NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT transaction_schemas_pkey PRIMARY KEY (trans_code), CONSTRAINT transaction_schemas_fk FOREIGN KEY (trans_code) REFERENCES digitaltwinapp.transaction_codes(code) );
-- No rows seeded here. JSON schemas are populated separately per transaction -- code as metadata requirements are defined. A missing row means no validation -- is enforced for that code (pass-through). The SchemaRegistryService -- pre-compiles all rows into memory at startup.
